task_completion.description: Create a custom component library named 'SmartGrow Devices'
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a custom shape library panel, typically on the left side of the draw.io interface, with the title 'SmartGrow Devices'.

task_completion.description: Create a grouped 'SoilProbe-X1' symbol with specific shapes and colors
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a composite symbol consisting of a light green vertical rectangle and a brown triangle tip. When selected, it should have a single bounding box indicating the shapes are grouped.

task_completion.description: Create a grouped 'Hub-Gateway-Z' symbol with specific shapes and colors
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a composite symbol consisting of a light blue square, a white circle (antenna), and a red circle (status LED). When selected, it should have a single bounding box indicating it is grouped.
Look for a file manager window showing 'SmartGrow_Lib.xml' inside the 'Diagrams' folder, or a save dialog confirming this path.
Look for the draw.io application window title or tab displaying 'field_deployment.drawio', or the file visible in the '~/Diagrams/' folder.

task_completion.description: Place exactly one Hub and three Soil Probes on the diagram canvas
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the main draw.io canvas. There should be exactly 1 Hub-Gateway-Z symbol and exactly 3 SoilProbe-X1 symbols present.

task_completion.description: Connect the Hub to the three Soil Probes with arrows
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for line/arrow elements originating from the single Hub symbol and terminating at each of the three Soil Probe symbols.

integrity.description: The agent used the draw.io graphical interface to create the library and diagram
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for active interaction with the draw.io GUI (toolbars, shape panels, color pickers). The agent should not be writing raw XML code in a text editor or terminal to bypass the UI.

integrity.description: The symbols are built using native draw.io shapes rather than imported images
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for the use of standard draw.io shapes (rectangles, ellipses, triangles) being dragged from the general shape library and styled, rather than pasting pre-made images.

integrity.description: The arrows are actual draw.io connector edges, not just drawn lines
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for arrows that snap to the connection points (blue crosses/green dots) of the grouped symbols, indicating proper logical connections in draw.io.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The custom library must be saved to /home/ga/Diagrams/SmartGrow_Lib.xml and the diagram to /home/ga/Diagrams/field_deployment.drawio. The SoilProbe-X1 must have a light green body (#d5e8d4) and brown tip (#a0522d). The Hub-Gateway-Z must have a light blue body (#dae8fc) and a pure red LED (#ff0000). The final diagram must contain exactly 1 Hub and 3 Probes connected by arrows.
